avatar:
> `avatar:` Posts the avatar of someone, or your own. 
 > ✦ Aliases: `av`
help:
> `help:` Opens the commands catalog of the bot. 
 > ✦ Aliases: `h`
invite:
> `invite:` Sends an invite link to invite the bot. 
 > ✦ Aliases: `inv`
math:
> `math:` Does a math operation. Note: deprecated. 
 > ✦ Aliases: `m`
ping:
> `ping:` Fetches your current ping with the bot. 
 > ✦ Aliases: `p`
rformat:
> `rformat:` Creates a role-menu based embed. 
 > ✦ Aliases: `rfmt`
talk:
> `talk:` Returns a message given a user input. 
 > ✦ Aliases: `t`, `t /m`
tone:
> `flip:` Returns one of 10 tone indicators. 
 > ✦ Aliases: `tn`
